subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath wept in such wise that the Concourse on High and the dwellers of the Cities of Eternity have raised their lamentations. By the life of God! He is in tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بکی المظلوم بما ناح الملا الاعلی و اهل مدائن البقاء لعمر الله انه فی بلاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
